/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/stm_bridge.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/stm_bridge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stm_bridge.dir/src/uart_port.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stm_bridge.dir/src/stm32_proto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stm_bridge.dir/src/server_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stm_bridge.dir/src/bridge.cpp.o -o stm_bridge  -lpthread
